articles.title: Vibe in Patriots building reportedly better than two weeks ago with Mike Vrabel
articles.description:
"It was very much the same old Vrabel that we observed a season ago."

The post Vibe in Patriots building reportedly better than two weeks ago with Mike Vrabel appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Mike Vrabel's return improves team morale in the Patriots' building.
Players report a noticeable positive change in atmosphere over the past two weeks.
Enhanced team vibe may lead to better performance for Boston's NFL fans.

articles.title: Willson Contreras’s go-ahead HR, Payton Tolle’s 8 strong innings lift Red Sox past Braves 3-2
articles.description:
Contreras clobbered a game-winning 426-foot homer to left field in the eighth frame.

The post Willson Contreras’s go-ahead HR, Payton Tolle’s 8 strong innings lift Red Sox past Braves 3-2 appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Willson Contreras hit a game-winning 426-foot homer in the eighth inning.
Payton Tolle pitched eight strong innings, contributing to the Red Sox's 3-2 victory.
This win improves the Red Sox's standing, boosting local fan morale.
